title: Senior AI Engineer
company_focus: AI services provider offering data science and AI solutions
description:
Company Description

Blend is a premier AI services provider, committed to co-
creating meaningful impact for its clients through the power
of data science, AI, technology, and people. With a mission
to fuel bold visions, Blend tackles significant challenges
by seamlessly aligning human expertise with artificial
intelligence. The company is dedicated to unlocking value
and fostering innovation for its clients by harnessing
world-class people and data-driven strategy. We believe that
the power of people and AI can have a meaningful impact on
your world, creating more fulfilling work and projects for
our people and clients. For more information, visit
www.blend360.com 

Job Description

We are looking for an AI Engineer with hands-on experience
designing and deploying scalable AI solutions. In this role,
you will be part of a cross-functional team working on
cutting-edge projects involving Retrieval-Augmented
Generation (RAG), agentic frameworks, and end-to-end MLOps
workflows.

You’ll play a key role in developing AI applications using
tools like LangChain, CrewAI, and Google ADK, while applying
advanced prompt engineering techniques and ensuring robust
monitoring and performance tracing. Your collaboration with
other engineering will help align innovative AI systems with
broader development goals.

What is this position about?

- Design, develop, and deploy AI solutions.
- Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and fine-
  tuning techniques.
- Utilize and integrate AI frameworks like LangChain.
- Use advanced prompt engineering techniques to solve complex
  problems with LLMs.
- Build and manage agentic frameworks such as CrewAI and
  Google ADK.
- Apply MLOps best practices to streamline AI development
  workflows.
- Monitor and trace AI applications performance.
- Collaborate across teams to ensure alignment with
  traditional ML and AI methodologies.
- Work on end-to-end software engineering for scalable
  solutions.

Qualifications

- 4+ years of experience in designing, developing, and
  deploying AI/ML solutions
- Strong hands-on experience with Azure AI & ML services,
  including:
  - Azure Machine Learning
  - Azure OpenAI Service
  - Azure AI Search / Cognitive Search
  - Azure Data & Compute services
- Strong understanding of machine learning fundamentals and
  traditional AI concepts
- Experience with MLOps tools and practices (model training,
  deployment, monitoring, CI/CD on Azure)
- Solid programming skills in Python (or other relevant
  languages)
- Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work in a
  collaborative, cross-functional environment
responsibilities: Design, develop, and deploy scalable AI solutions
Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and fine-tuning techniques
Build and manage agentic frameworks using LangChain, CrewAI, and Google ADK
Apply advanced prompt engineering techniques to solve complex problems with LLMs
Implement MLOps best practices to streamline AI development workflows
Monitor and trace AI application performance
Collaborate across teams to align AI systems with traditional ML methodologies
Work on end-to-end software engineering for scalable solutions
use_cases: Agentic AI frameworks and multi-agent systems
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on work building and deploying AI
systems including RAG implementations, agentic frameworks
(LangChain, CrewAI), prompt engineering, and fine-tuning
techniques. The position requires direct development of AI
applications and solutions, not just supporting
infrastructure.
